description_long: This is a three-tiered display or storage rack featuring three horizontal cylindrical rods, each supported by two vertical black metal posts. The rods appear to be made of polished wood with a natural grain, and are evenly spaced to allow for the placement or display of items. The base is a wide, flat, black platform with a stepped front edge, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. The vertical supports are robust and rectangular, securely holding the rods in place. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for showcasing items such as swords, batons, or decorative objects in an urban environment. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing open access and display.
description: A three-tiered open display rack with wooden rods and black metal supports on a wide, flat base. The design is minimalist and ideal for showcasing or storing elongated items.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three wooden rods and the full width of the black base, with both vertical supports clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical shape of the rods and the depth of the base, with the rods aligned one behind the other.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rods and supports from the opposite side, with the stepped base edge visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rods' rounded ends and the thickness of the vertical supports.
